creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
I guess, at least remove the 'Perforce Repository Administrators' line, which originated around fifteen years ago: 

<https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-src/commit/dd0cd967f8c6d39ef62231251e54a27c428a6e25#diff-f17190ec0d854eab6e5a40b471534f0e65d3c52b70908d3b173e317d7022ddabR60>

From <https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/freebsd-hackers/2022-April/000988.html>: 

> … the project no longer has a license. …

Compare with <https://www.freebsd.org/administration/>. 

Thanks
